title: Energy-based method for designing aptamers to target phosphatidylserine
author: Alharbi, Alsulami, et al.
description: Highlights•Aptamer designing method involving screened Coulomb interactions among charges in a drug-target biomolecule complex•Designing nucleic acid aptamers for binding specifically to phosphatidylserine•Creating aptamer-based therapeutic and diagnostic templates for various diseases

steps_raw.title: Methods and Materials
steps_raw.instruction: Three different methods have been applied. All of them will be briefed here, including the required materials.

materials: Three different methods have been applied. All of them will be briefed here, including the required materials.
